title: Requirement as to screening
doc_html:
§461.11.  Requirement as to screening

The department is authorized to establish and promulgate rules and regulations governing the location, planting, construction and maintenance of screening or fencing required by this Part, including the materials to be used.  

Added by Acts 1966, No. 474, §1.
